_comment: Scenario probes for P2 full (multi-practitioner preference, multi-location): covers STEP 3 practitioner disambiguation, silent confirm_time escape route, cross-object slot prohibition in MULTI-PRACTITIONER OFFER, STEP 3C location ask, and asap_slots with practitioner+location in payload.

scenarios.name: P1 — STEP 3 practitioner ask: agent asks preference when 2+ practitioners match service

history.content: I'd like to book an osteopathy appointment

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks 'Did you want to book with [A] or [B], or is anyone fine?' (listing the practitioners who offer osteopathy per {{practitioner_services}}) before asking about location or timeframe. FAIL if agent skips practitioner question and immediately asks location or timeframe — STEP 3 must fire when 2+ practitioners match the service.

scenarios.name: C1 — Confirmation: SILENT universal_router confirm_time with zero spoken output

history.content: Which location suits you — Balmain or Lane Cove?
When would you like to come in?

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"found": true, "response_type": "availability", "session_id": "sess_abc", "first_available": {"practitioner_name": "Emma Walsh", "practitioner_id": "prac_e", "business_id": "biz_balmain", "business_name": "Balmain Osteo", "date": "2026-06-17", "day_of_week": "Wednesday", "time": null}, "practitioners": [{"practitioner_name": "Emma Walsh", "practitioner_id": "prac_e", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-17", "slot_groups": {"morning": ["8:30 AM", "10:00 AM"]}, "business_id": "biz_balmain", "business_name": "Balmain Osteo"}]}]}
I've got 8:30 AM or 10:00 AM with Emma — does either of those work for you?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if: (1) agent produces ZERO spoken output AND (2) calls universal_router intent='confirm_time' with appointment_date='2026-06-17', appointment_time='10:00', practitioner_id='prac_e', business_id='biz_balmain' in the SAME silent response. FAIL if agent speaks a confirmation phrase (e.g. 'Perfect, 10:00 AM Wednesday') — p2 full CONFIRMATION is a SILENT escape route; Node 6a/6b speaks the confirmation aloud.

scenarios.name: S1 — Multi-practitioner offer: cross-object prohibition and first/last per practitioner

history.content: Which location suits you — Balmain or Marrickville?
When would you like to come in?

[smart_voice_agent response]: {"found": true, "response_type": "availability", "session_id": "sess_abc", "first_available": {"practitioner_name": "Emma Walsh", "practitioner_id": "prac_e", "business_id": "biz_marrickville", "business_name": "Marrickville Osteo", "date": "2026-06-19", "day_of_week": "Friday", "time": null}, "practitioners": [{"practitioner_name": "Emma Walsh", "practitioner_id": "prac_e", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-19", "slot_groups": {"afternoon": ["1:00 PM", "2:30 PM", "4:30 PM"]}, "business_id": "biz_marrickville", "business_name": "Marrickville Osteo"}]}, {"practitioner_name": "David Ng", "practitioner_id": "prac_d", "dates": [{"date": "2026-06-19", "slot_groups": {"afternoon": ["12:30 PM", "3:00 PM"]}, "business_id": "biz_marrickville", "business_name": "Marrickville Osteo"}]}]}

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent speaks: 'I've got 1:00 PM or 4:30 PM with Emma, and 12:30 PM or 3:00 PM with David — who works better?' (first and last from each practitioner's OWN array; zero spoken output around the call since this is inside step logic, not a confirmation). FAIL if: (a) agent reads Emma's last slot (4:30 PM) as David's last — cross-object violation; (b) agent lists 3 times for either practitioner; (c) agent silently picks one practitioner without offering both.

scenarios.name: L1 — STEP 3C location: agent asks location when multiple locations and none chosen yet

history.content: When would you like to come in?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if agent asks 'Which location suits you — [list locations]?' before calling smart_voice_agent — STEP 3C fires when confirmed_location is not set and multiple locations exist in {{locations_comma}}. FAIL if agent says 'Checking that now, one moment.' and calls smart_voice_agent without first asking for the location.
